active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — Production Hardening COMPLETE
active.notes: 3-layer hardening deployed: (1) Self-healing watchdog (3 silent cycles → auto-reset), (2) DEX scanner null-safe fix, (3) Simplified gates (score≥45 only). Result: 18 alerts/cycle, 120s cooldown per token, whale-only signals flowing freely. Production-ready.

active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE
active.notes: Win rate tracker deployed and resolving outcomes. 187 outcomes resolved (31.0% win, 25.7% loss, 43.3% neutral). Both engines writing to DB. Phase 2 (dashboard + macro filter) ready for approval.

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement Plan (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (frozen + telegram-silent signals fixed, hardening deployed). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason's go-ahead: (2) Win rate dashboard, (3) New alpha sources, (4) Event-driven architecture.
